tasks.task: Preserve the canonical proof command as the single authoritative entry path.

Centralize product-surface validation rules to remove renderer/validator drift.
Keep terminal presentation isolated from CLI orchestration logic.
Ensure validate-bundle passes directly on raw canonical export-proof output.
Keep README, canonical proof doc, demo doc, and review artifact synchronized.
Protect the demo surface with regression tests for runtime, docs, and validator behavior.
Publish the architecture/engineering review as a machine-readable contract artifact.
